ip_outcome_note: Card name 'Goomy', Dragon type, Basic subtype, flavor text matches. National Pokedex no. 704, Kalos Soft Tissue Pokemon. Base stage of Goodra pseudo-legendary line. Confirmed.

trivia_bullets.text: Goomy (no. 704) is consistently cited in official Pokedex entries as the weakest Dragon-type Pokemon in the franchise. Its body is covered in a moisture-dependent mucous membrane. Despite this, its evolutionary endpoint Goodra (no. 706) is a pseudo-legendary with 600 base stat total — one of the most extreme stat-progression gaps of any pseudo-legendary line. Goodra's stats are exactly double Goomy's.

"Their horns are powerful sensors. As soon as Goomy pick up any sign of enemies, they go into hiding. This is how they've survived." Survival-through-evasion framing is tonally consistent with the 'weakest Dragon-type' reputation — a creature whose strategy is avoidance until the final form can fight back.
Fusion Strike (Sword & Shield series, November 12, 2021) is one of the largest SwSh-era sets at 264 cards. Goomy appears as a Basic Dragon-type (no. 195/264, Common).

Illustrated by Miki Tanaka. Goodra in this same set was illustrated by Nagomi Nijo — a rare case of the base and final stage of a pseudo-legendary line being split across two different artists in the same expansion.
sources: Bleeding Cool: Nagomi Nijo artist spotlight (via WebSearch)
